creator: chalpin@cs.wisc.edu
text:
(In reply to alexvpetrov from comment #8)

The 6.4.37_1 update to fetchmail was part of a much broader update to the ports tree to have everything use the `ca_root_nss` that has been part of base for the last 3-ish years rather than the version from `security/ca_root_nss`. This effort has included changes in base and in a number of ports.

Per my comment 2, can you please provide the output of `fetchmail --version` and `certctl list | fgrep 'GlobalSign'`?
